testcase.name: create_lead

error.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //Span[contains(text(),'CRM')])[2] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//Span[contains(text(),'CRM')])[2]' is not a valid XPath expression.
